name: qiuai
description: Desktop image generation tool for gpt-image-2.

scripts.dev: concurrently "vite --config renderer/vite.config.js" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.lint: eslint main renderer/src shared tests vitest.config.mjs --ext .js,.vue,.mjs
